questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '8722dd9b-758f-41fc-822c-5fda4b663d5a' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '500418ec-cf4b-4bf3-a1a7-bd573733e6be'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '8722dd9b-758f-41fc-822c-5fda4b663d5a'; delete from question_items where id = '8722dd9b-758f-41fc-822c-5fda4b663d5a';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
